calendar.matters:
Re: Order To Show Casue Why Order Of Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Be Made
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(650-592-9151) Lawrence D. Miller for Plaintiff/Moving party .
No appearance by any attorney, party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Re: Order To Show Casue Why Order Of Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Be Made is GRANTED. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Why Order Of Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Be Made
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ORDER OF SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT BE MADE.

Appearances: Lawrence D. Miller (650.592.9151) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to do so may result in motion being taken off calendar. Order signed. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
